## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Strapi and GrowthX to discuss content performance, strategy, and upcoming initiatives.](https://fathom.video/share/r9ZyBhWipt2ktCStf4VZiDwKm_DbsVzb?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Strong growth in clicks (1,000+ mark reached) and impressions, with 42% WoW increase in clicks](https://fathom.video/share/r9ZyBhWipt2ktCStf4VZiDwKm_DbsVzb?tab=summary&timestamp=165.0)
  - [32 new integration pages drafted, 10 published; process refinements needed for imagery/logos](https://fathom.video/share/r9ZyBhWipt2ktCStf4VZiDwKm_DbsVzb?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
  - [20 new blog topic suggestions ready for review, focusing on listicle format](https://fathom.video/share/r9ZyBhWipt2ktCStf4VZiDwKm_DbsVzb?tab=summary&timestamp=935.0)
  - [Content optimization efforts ongoing: interlinking, intro adjustments, and monitoring refresh performance](https://fathom.video/share/r9ZyBhWipt2ktCStf4VZiDwKm_DbsVzb?tab=summary&timestamp=1003.0)

## Topics

### Performance Metrics

  - [Breached 1,000 click mark; record 266 weekly clicks (vs 215 last week)](https://fathom.video/share/r9ZyBhWipt2ktCStf4VZiDwKm_DbsVzb?tab=summary&timestamp=165.0)
  - [42% WoW increase in clicks, 23% increase in impressions](https://fathom.video/share/r9ZyBhWipt2ktCStf4VZiDwKm_DbsVzb?tab=summary&timestamp=226.0)
  - [Monthly growth even larger due to increased content volume](https://fathom.video/share/r9ZyBhWipt2ktCStf4VZiDwKm_DbsVzb?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [Goal: Reach \~1,000 clicks per week in coming months](https://fathom.video/share/r9ZyBhWipt2ktCStf4VZiDwKm_DbsVzb?tab=summary&timestamp=226.0)

### Content Strategy & AI Considerations

  - [ChatGPT/Perplexity AI \~3-4% search market share (Oct data)](https://fathom.video/share/r9ZyBhWipt2ktCStf4VZiDwKm_DbsVzb?tab=summary&timestamp=469.0)
  - [GrowthX adapting workflows for LLM-friendly content](https://fathom.video/share/r9ZyBhWipt2ktCStf4VZiDwKm_DbsVzb?tab=summary&timestamp=514.0)
  - [Upcoming presentation on content optimization: conversational intros, search snippet optimization](https://fathom.video/share/r9ZyBhWipt2ktCStf4VZiDwKm_DbsVzb?tab=summary&timestamp=552.0)
  - [Aim to appear in featured snippets while still encouraging clicks](https://fathom.video/share/r9ZyBhWipt2ktCStf4VZiDwKm_DbsVzb?tab=summary&timestamp=552.0)

### Integration Pages

  - [32 drafts, 46 total generated; 10 published so far](https://fathom.video/share/r9ZyBhWipt2ktCStf4VZiDwKm_DbsVzb?tab=summary&timestamp=743.0)
  - [New batch of 14 pages ready for review and publication](https://fathom.video/share/r9ZyBhWipt2ktCStf4VZiDwKm_DbsVzb?tab=summary&timestamp=795.0)
  - [Process adjustment needed: Include logos before publishing](https://fathom.video/share/r9ZyBhWipt2ktCStf4VZiDwKm_DbsVzb?tab=summary&timestamp=682.0)
  - [GrowthX to edit drafts, adding third-party integration links](https://fathom.video/share/r9ZyBhWipt2ktCStf4VZiDwKm_DbsVzb?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)

### Blog Articles

  - [50 articles published in total; 2 more in drafts](https://fathom.video/share/r9ZyBhWipt2ktCStf4VZiDwKm_DbsVzb?tab=summary&timestamp=982.0)
  - [20 new topic suggestions (rows 8-29) ready for review, focusing on listicles](https://fathom.video/share/r9ZyBhWipt2ktCStf4VZiDwKm_DbsVzb?tab=summary&timestamp=939.0)
  - [Ongoing optimization: interlinking best-performing articles (33k+ clicks)](https://fathom.video/share/r9ZyBhWipt2ktCStf4VZiDwKm_DbsVzb?tab=summary&timestamp=1080.0)
  - [Intro adjustments planned: implementing "hook-preview-proof" formula](https://fathom.video/share/r9ZyBhWipt2ktCStf4VZiDwKm_DbsVzb?tab=summary&timestamp=1140.0)

### Content Refreshes

  - [Monitoring 8-week periods post-refresh](https://fathom.video/share/r9ZyBhWipt2ktCStf4VZiDwKm_DbsVzb?tab=summary&timestamp=1431.0)
  - [Mixed results: Some batches showing significant improvements (e.g., 100% more clicks), others underperforming](https://fathom.video/share/r9ZyBhWipt2ktCStf4VZiDwKm_DbsVzb?tab=summary&timestamp=1512.0)
  - [Planning to apply V2 refresher to underperforming batches](https://fathom.video/share/r9ZyBhWipt2ktCStf4VZiDwKm_DbsVzb?tab=summary&timestamp=1536.0)
  - [Continuous monitoring and adjustment of refresh strategy](https://fathom.video/share/r9ZyBhWipt2ktCStf4VZiDwKm_DbsVzb?tab=summary&timestamp=1601.0)

### YouTube Content Integration

  - [Exploring use of YouTube video transcripts as content source](https://fathom.video/share/r9ZyBhWipt2ktCStf4VZiDwKm_DbsVzb?tab=summary&timestamp=1790.0)
  - [Potential for creating summary articles from multiple video sources](https://fathom.video/share/r9ZyBhWipt2ktCStf4VZiDwKm_DbsVzb?tab=summary&timestamp=1812.0)
  - [Focus on ecosystem news and trending topics](https://fathom.video/share/r9ZyBhWipt2ktCStf4VZiDwKm_DbsVzb?tab=summary&timestamp=1796.0)
  - [AI-assisted summarization and listicle creation from video content](https://fathom.video/share/r9ZyBhWipt2ktCStf4VZiDwKm_DbsVzb?tab=summary&timestamp=1830.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Paul/Golzar to review and approve new blog topic suggestions (rows 8-29)](https://fathom.video/share/r9ZyBhWipt2ktCStf4VZiDwKm_DbsVzb?tab=summary&timestamp=939.0)
  - [Theo to verify internal publication process for integration pages, ensuring logo inclusion](https://fathom.video/share/r9ZyBhWipt2ktCStf4VZiDwKm_DbsVzb?tab=summary&timestamp=682.0)
  - [Andrej to continue content optimization efforts: interlinking, intro adjustments](https://fathom.video/share/r9ZyBhWipt2ktCStf4VZiDwKm_DbsVzb?tab=summary&timestamp=1003.0)
  - [Team to monitor and address any Strapi v4 code references in content](https://fathom.video/share/r9ZyBhWipt2ktCStf4VZiDwKm_DbsVzb?tab=summary&timestamp=1270.0)
  - [Paul to provide more context on desired YouTube content integration approach](https://fathom.video/share/r9ZyBhWipt2ktCStf4VZiDwKm_DbsVzb?tab=summary&timestamp=1790.0)
  - [GrowthX to refine YouTube content sourcing strategy based on Strapi's needs](https://fathom.video/share/r9ZyBhWipt2ktCStf4VZiDwKm_DbsVzb?tab=summary&timestamp=1857.0)
